programme.desc: Dr Welyne Jehom, an anthropologist, search for expert traditional headgear makers in order to deepen her own knowledge of the craft and preserve the tradition for the benefit of future generations.

programme.title: Aroma Malaysia Ep02
programme.desc: Aroma Malaysia menampilkan eksplorasi kulinari yang memperkenalkan hidangan tradisional dan tempatan, diperkaya dengan pengalaman pengembaraan merentasi pelbagai destinasi budaya

programme.title: Borneo Dive Ep13
programme.desc: Explore the unique dive sites of Sabah and Sarawak, which attract both local and international divers. The region offers a rich variety of marine life for recreational and avid divers to observe.

programme.title: My Health, My Choice Ep01
programme.desc: My Health, My Choice explores daily practices, behaviors, and health issues, highlighting factors like attitudes, diet, environment, and relationships, and provides practical solutions.

programme.title: Stories in Motion Ep04
programme.desc: Five choreographers in Sarawak are given two weeks to create a story using a surprise 'wildcard style', incorporating unique Sarawak genres or styles.

programme.title: Rihlah: Islam Di Borneo Ep11
programme.desc: Rihlah: Islam di Borneo menjejaki sejarah dan perkembangan Islam di Sarawak serta hubungannya dengan Sabah, Kalimantan dan Brunei melalui budaya, migrasi dan komuniti tempatan.

programme.title: Sarawak Women in History Ep03
programme.desc: Explore the lives of loud women who stood up for Sarawak, breaking barriers, social stigmas and creating history. This documentary, we celebrate and appreciate the reverberation of their voice to this day

programme.title: (L) TVS Pagi
programme.desc: TVS Pagi membawakan perkembangan menyeluruh dari dalam dan luar negara.

programme.title: Joran Borneo Ep07
programme.desc: JORAN BORNEO,'Majalah' travelog dalam Bahasa Melayu/dialek tempatan ini bakal menjejaki lokasi-lokasi 'lubuk' ikan di sekitar BORNEO. Siri ini akan dibawa oleh 2 pengacara tempatan dari Sarawak dan Sabah.

programme.title: (DL) World News
programme.desc: Delivers timely and in-depth coverage of key global events, focusing on international politics, economics, and societal changes, with a spotlight on the latest developments impacting the world today.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: Louis Bloom, a petty thief, realises that he can make money by capturing photographs of crime scenes and starts resorting to extreme tactics to get them.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Equipped with an elaborate plan, clear vision and unwavering determination, Richard Williams, a sports coach, encourages his daughters, Venus and Serena, to become tennis champions.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: Hank, a prison guard, is a part of convicted murderer Lawrence Musgrove's execution, but when he meets Leticia, a Black woman, he becomes smitten with her, unaware that she is Musgrove's widow.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A man wrongly accused of killing his wife races to find the real killer while a determined U.S. Marshal attempts to nab him.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: John, son of Sarah Connor, sends a reprogrammed Terminator to protect his younger self, who also holds the key to humanity's survival, from the T-1000, an advanced robot created by Skynet.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Billy Beane, a baseball general manager, and Peter Brand, an economics graduate, challenge convention as they try to form a competitive sports team using computer-based methods.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Reginald's manager helps him rise to fame, but also creates chaos in his life.

programme.desc: After a series of mysterious murders, including the "faceless female corpse" & the "sealed stone coffin case", detectives work to unveil hidden links between the cases & a complex network of crimes.

programme.desc: Top lawyer Tang Ying Ying clashes with her boss Kang Jun in court as their relationship evolve through conflicts. The drama explores life choices, love, marriage, & career.

programme.title: Buletin Tv9

programme.title: Sutera Sebalik Wajah

programme.title: Monster Jam Tv Series

programme.title: Tanyalah Ustaz Ep17

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Alison, an ambitious television reporter, has a one-night stand with Ben, an immature loafer. When Alison gets pregnant as a result, the two attempt to stay together and have the child.

programme.title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
programme.desc: Filmmaker Zoe Stevenson documents her Pakistani best friend's journey to an arranged marriage. Over time, the process begins to make her challenge her own attitudes towards relationships.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Devastated by his wife's request for a divorce, middle-aged Cal ventures out to meet women according to his new friend's advice.

programme.title: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: New-York based lawyers Audrey and Daniel, who often compete against each other, get married. However, they find it difficult to learn to draw lines between their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: Dupree stays on as a houseguest with the newlyweds, much to the couple's annoyance.

programme.title: P.S. I Love You
programme.desc: A young woman loses her husband to an illness. However, her life takes a turn when she learns that he has left her some messages to ease her pain.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: A couple search for each other years after the night they first met, fell in love, and separated, convinced that one day they'd end up together.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Greg Focker and his fiancée Pam decide to make their respective parents meet before their wedding. However, the Fockers' relaxed attitude does not go down well with Pam's family.

programme.title: What Men Want

programme.desc: Prof Muhaya membincangkan isu 'Penyalahgunaan Media Sosial' bersama Janna Nick yang berkongsi pengalamannya menghadapi tekanan sosial media.

programme.title: Solo Yolo : Checklist Ep04
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti travelog ini merakamkan pengembaraan dan eksplorasi solo artis dan selebriti popular ke beberapa buah destinasi terkenal di dunia dalam menyahut cabaran jalan-jalan bersendirian!

programme.title: RASA Instafamous Ep04
programme.desc: Majalah masakan nombor 1 di Malaysia kini di kaca televisyen anda bersama sama instafamous jemputan minggu ini

programme.title: Kalau Dah Berbini Ep04
programme.desc: Zamir nak tukar enjin keretanya tetapi tidak dibenarkan Maria. Zamir gunakan duit simpanan anak mereka dengan harapan bakal dapat pelanggan besar.

programme.title: Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa Ep29
programme.desc: Maisara katakan yang dia boleh hidup sendiri tanpa Nazril. Qistina tak setuju dengan keputusan Maisara untuk berpisah dengan Nazril dan seharusnya Maisara memikirkan tentang anak dalam kandungannya sekali.

programme.desc: France faces Morocco in a quarterfinal match of the FIFA World Cup at Boston Stadium. France defeated Paraguay 1-0 in the Round of 16 with the goal scored by Kylian Mbappé. Morocco won against Canada 3-0 where Azzedine Ounahi scored twice.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Netherlands meets Morocco in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Monterrey Stadium. Netherlands ranked first after defeating Tunisia 3-1 in the final Group F match. Morocco ranked second in Group C after a 4-2 win against Haiti.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Belgium faces Senegal in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Seattle Stadium. Senegal finished third in Group I after defeating Iraq 5-0. Belgium ranked first after defeating New Zealand by a 5-1 margin to close out their Group G play.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: The first FIFA World Cup Group H match between Spain and Cabo Verde takes place at Atlanta Stadium. Cabo Verde makes a historic debut by participating in the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their first game is against the 2024 UEFA Euro champions.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Mexico faces England in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Mexico City Stadium. Mexico defeated Ecuador 2-0 with goals scored by Raul Jimenez and Julian Quinones. England won against Congo DR 2-1 with both goals scored by Harry Kane.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina faces Cabo Verde in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. Cabo Verde finished second in Group H after a 0-0 draw with Saudi Arabia. Argentina ranked first following a 3-1 win over Jordan in their final Group J match.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Belgium and Spain meet in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Los Angeles Stadium. Spain beat Portugal 1-0 behind a stoppage-time goal from midfielder Mikel Merino. Belgium dominated USA 4-1 in which forward Charles De Ketelaere netted a brace.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina meets England in a semi-final match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Argentina overcame Switzerland 3-1, Lautaro Martínez scored the final goal to seal the win. Jude Bellingham scored a brace in England's 2-1 victory over Norway.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: France faces Spain in a semi-final match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. France beat Morocco 2-0 behind Kylian Mbappe's opener, marking his eighth World Cup goal. Spain defeated Belgium 2-1 after Mikel Merino scored in the 88th minute.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: The United States and Paraguay compete in the first match of Group D in the FIFA World Cup. Weston McKennie leads the United States squad while Paraguay features midfielder Diego Gomez. The United States plays at home in Los Angeles.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Norway and England meet in the FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Miami Stadium. Norway beat Brazil 2-1 behind Erling Haaland's late brace, while England defeated Mexico 3-2 behind Jude Bellingham's brace and Harry Kane's clutch penalty sealed the win.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina plays Spain in the Final match of the FIFA World Cup at New York New Jersey Stadium. Spain secured a 2-0 shutout over France to advance to the finals. Lionel Messi assisted the winning goal in Argentina's 2-1 victory over England.

programme.title: The Lego Movie
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Fallout
programme.desc: After a crucial operation goes wrong, IMF Agent Ethan Hunt and his team must work together with a few allies to prevent a nuclear attack.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: As a nefarious force imperils Earth, an unlikely alliance forms between Optimus Prime's Autobots and the mighty Maximals, aided by two humans to safeguard mankind's future.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: When Warden Hennessey offers Jensen and other prisoners a chance to compete in a weaponised car race, millions watch as these criminals with life sentences race armoured cars to earn their freedom.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.

programme.title: Oga & Friends S2 Ep02
programme.desc: Oga, Reemo & Atam menyelinap masuk trak sampai ke markas Cerobot . Tersilap langkah, satu jeritan, dan huru-hara pun tercetus, mereka perlu senyap & berhati-hati dalam misi operasi masuk ke dalam!

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep03
programme.desc: Didi dan kawan-kawannya beraksi sebagai pasukan bola sepak menentang pasukan yang hebat. Namun Nana, Jojo dan Aera masih belum mahir, menyebabkan Didi nekad bertindak sendirian di padang.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep03
programme.desc: Jojo disedut ke dalam buku dan jumpa Didi. Disana terdapat Belalang serta semut-semut yang sibuk bersiap untuk musim sejuk. Belalang asyik bermain muzik; Didi, Jojo dan semut-semut terus mengumpul makanan.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep04
programme.desc: Akar menjalar terus membesar menutupi perpustakaan magikal. Sementara itu, Didi dan Jojo bertemu dengan Beruang si penggembala yang suka meminta tolong kerana kebosanan. Tiba-tiba, Serigala muncul.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep05
programme.desc: Aera terus membaca ketika akar perlahan-lahan merayap ke dalam perpustakaan. Sementara itu, Didi, Nana dan Jojo membina rumah, tetapi sebaik sahaja siap, Serigala tiba-tiba muncul di hadapan mereka.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep06
programme.desc: Aera disedut ke dalam buku sebagai Si Tudung Merah. Dia berangkat melawat Nek Kura tetapi bertemu dengan Serigala. Serigala segera menculik Nek Kura, menyamar sebagai dirinya, dan menunggu ketibaan Aera.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep07
programme.desc: Nana menyelamatkan Aera tetapi terperangkap dalam buku. Di dalamnya, dia bertemu seekor Tikus yang ditangkap oleh Singa. Nana cuba meredakan keadaan dan meyakinkan Singa untuk melepaskan Tikus itu.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep08
programme.desc: Jojo tersedut ke dalam buku dan bertemu Nana serta Rubah. Mereka lihat Singa mengumpan haiwan ke gua tanpa ada yang keluar. Curiga, mereka merancang misi menyelamat, namun sesuatu tak dijangka berlaku.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 23
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 128

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 50
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 24
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth.
